prompt:
# T-062 â€” Stage-Gate end-to-end

PRD: docs/prd/01-NPD-PRD.md Â§17.6, Â§17.7
Project root: /Users/mariuszkrawczyk/Projects/monopilot-kira

## Goal
Playwright E2E covering full project lifecycle: NPD Manager creates project â†’ kanban view â†’ tick required items â†’ advance G0â†’G1â†’G2 â†’ request G3 approval â†’ e-sign with password â†’ assert gate_approvals row + esign_hash + outbox events emitted in order.

## Implementation contract
1. apps/web/e2e/npd/stage-gate.spec.ts: login as NPD Manager â†’ /(npd)/pipeline â†’ click + new â†’ fill wizard â†’ submit â†’ assert kanban shows new project at G0 â†’ tick checklist items â†’ drag to G1 â†’ drag to G2 â†’ click 'Request Approval' â†’ e-sign with password â†’ assert success.
2. Integration test apps/web/__tests__/integration/gate-events.test.ts: verifies outbox events emitted in order npd.project.created â†’ npd.gate.advanced (Ă—2) â†’ npd.gate.approved.
3. Fixtures seed deterministic project state (no checklists pre-seeded).

## Files
- apps/web/e2e/npd/stage-gate.spec.ts [create]
- apps/web/__tests__/integration/gate-events.test.ts [create]
- apps/web/e2e/npd/fixtures/stage-gate-seed.ts [create]

## Acceptance criteria
1. Given an NPD Manager session, when the user creates a project then advances it from G0 to G3 via the UI then approves with password, then a gate_approvals row exists with decision='approved' + non-null esign_hash + esigned_at per Â§17.6 e-sig flow
2. Given the project lifecycle completes, when the outbox table is queried, then events appear in order: npd.project.created â†’ npd.gate.advanced (G0â†’G1) â†’ npd.gate.advanced (G1â†’G2) â†’ npd.gate.advanced (G2â†’G3) â†’ npd.gate.approved per Â§17.6
3. Given an attempt to drag from G2 to G4 (non-adjacent), when drop fires, then the card snaps back and a toast 'Adjacency violation' appears per Â§17.12 adjacency guard

## Test strategy
- RED: write the 3 specs above before final wiring; run against isolated test container
- Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e stage-gate && pnpm --filter web test gate-events'

## Risk red lines
- Do not skip outbox event ordering assertion
- Do not run against shared/staging DB
- Do not embed real secrets in test password (use fixture)

## 2026-05-03 E2E spine patch â€” extend to full release path
Extend this E2E beyond G3 approval to the canonical spine:
Brief creation â†’ linked project at G0 â†’ G0/G1/G2 â†’ G3 create/map FG candidate â†’ department closure evidence â†’ G4 approval/preflight â†’ NPD Builder release dry-run or real test release â†’ Technical approval dependency visible â†’ release status/read model asserted.

This test must verify that D365 disabled does not block Monopilot release and that D365 export does not set factory release state.

pipeline_inputs.description: Playwright E2E + integration test for project create â†’ advance G0..G3 â†’ e-sign + outbox event ordering + adjacency guard.
pipeline_inputs.details:
E2E lifecycle test exercises kanban DnD; integration test asserts outbox event ordering; fixtures seed clean state.
Preserved acceptance requirements: Given an NPD Manager creates a brief, when the flow starts, then a linked npd_project at G0 exists before any FG is mapped.; Given the project reaches G3, when no FG candidate is mapped, then approval is blocked; after mapping, G3 can proceed.; Given G4 succeeds and NPD Builder release runs, then WIP/FG records, initial shared BOM, factory_spec in_review/draft, and release status pending_technical_approval are visible.; Given Technical approves the initial factory_spec/BOM bundle in the test fixture or mocked handoff, then the read model changes to approved_for_factory/released_to_factory and factory_available_at is set.; Given D365 integration is disabled, then the E2E still passes; given optional export is run, it does not mutate release state.
out_of_scope: Do not run V18 risk-blocker scenario (T-087)
acceptance_criteria: Given an NPD Manager session, when the user creates a project then advances it from G0 to G3 via the UI then approves with password, then a gate_approvals row exists with decision='approved' + non-null esign_hash + esigned_at per Â§17.6 e-sig flow

Given the project lifecycle completes, when the outbox table is queried, then events appear in order: npd.project.created â†’ npd.gate.advanced (G0â†’G1) â†’ npd.gate.advanced (G1â†’G2) â†’ npd.gate.advanced (G2â†’G3) â†’ npd.gate.approved per Â§17.6
Given an attempt to drag from G2 to G4 (non-adjacent), when drop fires, then the card snaps back and a toast 'Adjacency violation' appears per Â§17.12
Additional preserved requirements in details are implemented and covered by targeted tests.
test_strategy: RED: 3 specs before final wiring; run against isolated test container
Run 'pnpm --filter web test:e2e stage-gate && pnpm --filter web test gate-events'
risk_red_lines: Do not skip outbox event ordering assertion
Do not run against shared/staging DB
Do not embed real secrets in test password
Do not stop E2E at approve G3.
Do not assert Built as final release status.
